children.text: collect and disseminate information and prepare for an agricultural disease emergency, agroterrorist act, or other threat to agricultural biosecurity; and
coordinate activities described in paragraph (1) among agencies and offices within the Department.

children.heading: Relation to existing DHS communication systems
children.label: b Relation to existing DHS communication systems

children.heading: Consistency and coordination
children.label: 1 Consistency and coordination
children.text: The communication center established under subsection (a) shall, to the maximum extent practicable, share and coordinate the dissemination of timely information with the Department of Homeland Security and other communication systems of appropriate Federal departments and agencies.

children.heading: Avoiding redundancies
children.label: 2 Avoiding redundancies
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not be construed to impede, conflict with, or duplicate the communications activities performed by the Secretary of Homeland Security under any provision of law.
such sums as are necessary for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2013; and
$2,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2014 through 2023.
